name: PMV Consumer Acquisition Corp.
business: PMV Consumer Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company has no operating history and no revenues.

exposures.sentence: Although we initially intended to focus our search for a business opportunity in the consumer products industry, we are not limited to evaluating a business opportunity in any particular industry sector.
